name: foresight
description: AI multi-agent scenario simulator — describe any event and watch AI agents react in real-time

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && venv/bin/pip install flask flask-cors anthropic psycopg2-binary apscheduler praw tweepy requests beautifulsoup4 python-dotenv pydantic
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
